{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"202603220850254B0A3B3F87B28A898654"}"},"total":26},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7566489200934470425","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"有女主，有点中二式的互喊招式，爽文挺爽的"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1761711961,"group_id":"7559649571316435993","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N15kVclm3/RU6HAqchjC4grYN4ejUopgsujSdT8PF3Um","gender":2,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":2,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/e3b3234f2a5a412db374d691ba2da362~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776705668&x-signature=rAhlmT80vdAYGxSt4098cmMiHnA%3D","user_id":"1922407385017671","user_name":"木易散"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"1922407385017671","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7559649571316435993","book_info":{"abstract":"神话擂台降临世间，东方神话断层，华夏面临五个词条选择，根本不知华夏众神。
西方诸国围攻华夏。
樱花国有须佐之男，伊邪那美。
天竺有天帝因陀罗，大天湿婆。
漂亮国有冥王哈迪斯，天父奥丁。
只有华夏，神明文化缺失，只知道最弱小的土地神，门神。
在华夏面临生死危机，只差最后一场便要被西方诸国吞噬之际。
历史系学生陈玄，穿越而来，闪耀金光，神性100%，华夏万千神明皆可召唤。
面对樱花国强大的须佐之男，顽童闹海最弱小，万万不可选？
不，我命由我不由天，杀神哪吒！
齐天大圣应召而来，战破天穹，伊邪那美又如何？
…………………
二郎神杨戬，战神刑天，女娲，创世神盘古！
东方神话皆弱神？
从陈玄到来之际，谁在敢言东方神话皆弱神？","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/ccad75becea7188222b1ca7a37bf4377","author":"喜欢赖床","author_id":"","book_id":"7559649571316435993","book_name":"国运擂台：神话断绝，只有我知道东方神明","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#502010","creation_status":"0","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"5983人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"0","category_schema":"[{"category_id":1014,"name":"都市高武","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=1014&name=都市高武&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":1,"name":"都市","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=1&name=都市&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":37,"name":"穿越","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=37&name=穿越&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":69,"name":"直播","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=69&name=直播&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":496,"name":"国运","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=496&name=国运&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":500,"name":"断层","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=500&name=断层&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7560137946049825816","read_count":"5983","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"631928"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"6.0","serial_count":"189","tags":"都市高武,都市,穿越,直播,国运,断层","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/403962b813f27d06ee287da48b87985b~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779324625&x-signature=tTlVMfJ%2BMWnhsuH0dYyGulgklgc%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"0","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"103"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"202603220850254B0A3B3F87B28A898654"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"8","score_suffix_text":"阅读2小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":1,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":0,"
